scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n web,landing,tiger,dog "bun run dev:web" "bun run dev:landing" "bun run dev:tiger" "bun run dev:dog"
scripts.typecheck: bun --cwd packages/types tsc --noEmit && bun --cwd packages/notion-client tsc --noEmit && bun --cwd packages/animalese tsc --noEmit && bun --cwd apps/web tsc --noEmit && bun --cwd apps/landing tsc --noEmit && bun --cwd agents/runtime tsc --noEmit
